member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.InteractionDataType
member.summary: The type of interaction that the user has with a button in the getting started tab.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.InteractionDataType.CallToAction
member.summary: For a button that does something in the editor, e.g. a button that opens a window or imports a sample.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.InteractionDataType.Link
member.summary: For a button that opens a URL in the browser (e.g. a documentation link).

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.IOnboardingSectionAnalyticsProvider
member.summary: For the object that provides the analytics functionality to send interaction events on some Onboarding section in the getting started tab.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.IOnboardingSectionAnalyticsProvider.SendInteractionEvent(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Analytics.InteractionDataType,System.String)
member.summary: Send event for a button interaction in the getting started tab.
member.param: Whether it is a call to action or a link
The name of the button in the UI

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData
member.summary: Stores what the user answered in the GameSpecs questionnaire. The Preset is not included here.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData.Answers
member.summary: The list of answers the user has given so far.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData.Clone
member.summary: Makes a deep copy of the object.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnsweredQuestion
member.summary: Answer to a single game spec question.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnsweredQuestion.QuestionId
member.summary: The question identifier as defined in the game spec questionnaire.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnsweredQuestion.Answers
member.summary: The answers selected by the user (most often, it contains only one element).

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute
member.summary: Onboarding section metadata to be picked up by the multiplayer center. This can only be used once per type. If you wish to make the same section appear in multiple categories/conditions, please create two types inheriting from the same base class.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.Category
member.summary: The UI category the section will fall into.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.Id
member.summary: The id of that section (defines uniqueness and whether priority should be used)

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.DisplayCondition
member.summary: Optional: condition to display the section. By default, if the type exists in the project, the section is shown.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.HostingModelDependency
member.summary: Optional: dependency on a certain hosting model choice.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.NetcodeDependency
member.summary: Optional: dependency on a certain netcode choice.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.Priority
member.summary: Optional: priority in case several onboarding sections are defined for the same package/id. Use-case: new version of a package needs a different onboarding and overrides what we ship with the Multiplayer Center.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.Order
member.summary: Optional: this is the order in which the sections will be displayed in the UI within the section. (the higher the Order value, the further down)

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.TargetPackageId
member.summary: Optional: the package identifier that this section is related to, e.g. "com.unity.transport".

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionAttribute.#ctor(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the attribute.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory
member.summary: The UI category the section will fall into.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.Intro
member.summary: Comes at the top and should cover overarching topics for beginners

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.Netcode
member.summary: Section about the fundamentals of gameplay synchronization implementation and debugging. This includes netcode and tools related to netcode, as well as alternative solutions.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.ConnectingPlayers
member.summary: Section gathering information about connecting players together, such as lobbies, voice chat and matchmaking.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.ServerInfrastructure
member.summary: Section gathering information about deploying, running and optimizing a game server.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.Other
member.summary: Something else.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.OnboardingSectionCategory.LiveOps
member.summary: LiveOps sections which are meant to be used after some development happened on the game.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.DisplayCondition
member.summary: A condition for a section to be displayed.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.DisplayCondition.None
member.summary: As long as the type exists in the project, the section is shown. Exception: a section with a higher priority is defined for the same id.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.DisplayCondition.PackageInstalled
member.summary: A target package is defined in TargetPackageId and the package is installed If multiple types share the same id, the one with the highest priority is shown.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.DisplayCondition.NoPackageInstalled
member.summary: Shown if no multiplayer package is installed (e.g. for the first time user that has not installed anything) Check SectionsFinder.k_TargetPackages to see which packages are checked

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.InfrastructureDependency
member.summary: Defines if a section depends on a certain hosting model.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.InfrastructureDependency.None
member.summary: No dependency, the section is shown if all other conditions are also met.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.InfrastructureDependency.ClientHosted
member.summary: Only available when the user has selected a client hosted infrastructure.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.InfrastructureDependency.DedicatedServer
member.summary: Only available when the user has selected a dedicated server infrastructure.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.InfrastructureDependency.CloudCode
member.summary: Only available when the user has selected Cloud Code as their hosting model.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.IOnboardingSection
member.summary: A view for a single onboarding section. Classes implementing this interface should be marked with the .

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.IOnboardingSection.Root
member.summary: The visual element that will be added to the onboarding window. After Load is called, it should never be null.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.IOnboardingSection.Load
member.summary: Makes the section ready to be displayed. May be called several times in a row.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.IOnboardingSection.Unload
member.summary: Frees anything that needs to be.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionDependingOnUserChoices
member.summary: For sections that depend on what the user selected in either the game specs or the solution selection.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionDependingOnUserChoices.HandleAnswerData(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.AnswerData)
member.summary: Receives the answer data and handles it. This is called after Load.

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionDependingOnUserChoices.HandleUserSelectionData(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData)
member.summary: Receives the user selection data and handles it. This is called after Load.
member.param: The latest value of the selection

member.name: M:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionDependingOnUserChoices.HandlePreset(Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset)
member.summary: Receives the preset data and handles it. This is called after Load.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionWithAnalytics
member.summary: Implement this interface to have access to the Multiplayer Center analytics provider. Use the analytics provider to log events when the user interacts with the section.

member.name: P:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.ISectionWithAnalytics.AnalyticsProvider
member.summary: This will be set before the load function is called. The implementor can then use the Analytics provider to send events to the analytics backend.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset
member.summary: Game genres that can be selected. Each one is associated with pre-selected answers for the questionnaire, except for `None`.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.None
member.summary: Start from scratch, no preset.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Adventure
member.summary: Adventure genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Shooter
member.summary: Shooter, Battle Royale, Battle Arena genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Racing
member.summary: Racing genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.TurnBased
member.summary: Card Battle, Turn-based, Tabletop genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Simulation
member.summary: Simulation genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Strategy
member.summary: Strategy genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Sports
member.summary: Sports genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.RolePlaying
member.summary: Role-Playing, MMO genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Async
member.summary: Async, Idle, Hyper Casual, Puzzle genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Fighting
member.summary: Fighting genre.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.Preset.Sandbox
member.summary: Arcade, Platformer, Sandbox genre.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData
member.summary: Stores the selection of the main solutions from the recommendation tab.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel
member.summary: The possible hosting models that the user can select.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel.None
member.summary: Empty (no selection)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel.ClientHosted
member.summary: Client hosted model

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel.DedicatedServer
member.summary: Dedicated server model

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel.CloudCode
member.summary: Most of the logic will be in the cloud.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.HostingModel.DistributedAuthority
member.summary: Distributed Authority (the authority over the game logic is spread across multiple clients).

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution
member.summary: The possible netcode solutions that the user can select.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution.None
member.summary: Empty (no selection)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution.NGO
member.summary: Netcode for GameObjects

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution.N4E
member.summary: Netcode for Entities

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution.CustomNetcode
member.summary: Custom netcode solution, potentially based on Unity Transport

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.NetcodeSolution.NoNetcode
member.summary: No netcode (no real time synchronization needed)

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.SelectedHostingModel
member.summary: The hosting model selected by the user.

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Common.SelectedSolutionsData.SelectedNetcodeSolution
member.summary: The netcode solution selected by the user.

member.name: T:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants
member.summary: Common style classes that can be accessed from the quickstart sections

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.CheckmarkClass
member.summary: Green checkmark to reflect a success Applicable to VisualElement to show a success state

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.OnBoardingSectionFoldout
member.summary: The style that enables to have foldable sections in the getting started tab. Applicable to Foldout

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.OnBoardingSectionClass
member.summary: Default style for an onboarding section Apply to the top level element (Root) in Onboarding section Applicable to VisualElement

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.OnboardingSectionTitle
member.summary: Default style for the title of an onboarding section Apply to the title visual element (Label) in Onboarding section

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.OnBoardingSectionMainButton
member.summary: Button inside the header of a onboarding-section Applicable to Button

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.OnBoardingShortDescription
member.summary: Button inside the header of a onboarding-section Applicable to Label

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.DocButtonClass
member.summary: A button that opens a documentation page Applicable to Button

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.FlexSpaceClass
member.summary: An element that will take all the remaining space in a flex container Applicable to VisualElement

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.HorizontalContainerClass
member.summary: Horizontal flex container Applicable to VisualElement

member.name: F:Unity.Multiplayer.Center.Onboarding.StyleConstants.HighlightBackgroundClass
member.summary: Darker background color in dark mode, lighter in light mode Applicable to VisualElement
